def calculate_cumulative_sum(tuples_list):
    def _sum_nested(tuples):
        total = 0
        for item in tuples:
            if isinstance(item, tuple):
                total += _sum_nested(item)
            elif isinstance(item, (int, float)):
                total += item
        return total

    return _sum_nested(tuples_list)
